pageContext.name: Bolo Yeung: Evolution Autograph Edition Tribute Set
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Bolo Yeung: Evolution Autograph Edition Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue Set. This incredible collection is ultra-limited to an edition of only 50 pieces and features two impressive mixed media statues celebrating the action film icon.  Inspired by multiple iconic eras in Yeung's prolific film and martial arts career, the Bolo Yeung: Evolution Autograph Edition Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue Set includes both the Jeet Kune Do and Kung Fu versions, each measuring 23 tall and 19.5 wide. These ultra-realistic and highly detailed statues showcase the athleticism, intensity, and immense discipline exhibited by Yeung throughout his cinema appearances that made him a fan-favorite on-screen fighter opposite the likes of Bruce Lee, Jean-Claude Van Damme, and more.  The Bolo Yeung: Kung Fu Statue features a mixed media costume over a fully sculpted athletic physique. He wears tailored red and black fabric shorts and a red fabric belt. The hanging tails of the white and red sculpted headband on his portrait are white fabric for added realism, and his furious expression and shaggy black hair indicate that he is a formidable foe. The Kung Fu edition statue includes a standard bronze-colored base with dragon detailing, making it perfect for display alongside the Jeet Kune Do edition.  The Bolo Yeung: Jeet Kune Do Statue features a mixed media costume over a fully sculpted athletic physique. He wears tailored white fabric gi pants and a black fabric belt to signify his martial arts accomplishments. Yeung's portrait features a stern expression and a short style haircut framing his face. He stands on a gold-colored base with sculpted dragon details that features a recessed plate hand-signed by Bolo Yeung himself. Action movie fans won't want to miss their chance to bring home the ultimate homage to this iconic actor with this exciting autograph edition set.  Bring home all the martial arts action to your collection with the Bolo Yeung: Evoluti
